channel.title: Events on Open History Map
channel.description: Recent content in Events on Open History Map

item.title: Presentation of Arena Colossei
item.description: Event organized with Just Play Bologna and Top Hat Games explaining the historical and archaeological reasons and origins for the boardgame Arena Colossei

item.title: Mappatohm 2018 - Bologna
item.description: During the ROCK project made with the municipality of Bologna, we organized three days of mapping and exploring the “U-zone”. More details here
